article.description: — Isaiah Joe scored 22 points and Cason Wallace added 20 points and 10 assists to help the short-handed Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 121-113 on Sunday.
article.headline: Short-handed Thunder hit 21 3s to beat Cavaliers 121-113, snapping Cleveland’s 7-game streak

images.caption: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights
images.name: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights

article.linkText: Short-handed Thunder hit 21 3s to beat Cavaliers 121-113, snapping Cleveland’s 7-game streak
article.story: OKLAHOMA CITY -- — Isaiah Joe scored 22 points and Cason Wallace added 20 points and 10 assists to help the short-handed Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 121-113 on Sunday. Chet Holmgren had 17 points, 15 rebounds and three blocks for Oklahoma City (44-14), which made 21 of 41 3-point attempts (51.2%), including six by Joe, and converted 17 turnovers into 31 points. The Thunder played without injured starters Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (abdominal strain) and Jalen Williams (strained right hamstring). and key contributors Ajay Mitchell (abdominal strain) and Alex Caruso (sprained left ankle). Donovan Mitchell, James Harden and Sam Merrill each had 20 points for Cleveland (36-22), which lost for the first time in eight games. The Cavaliers, who made 13 of 39 3-pointers (33.3%), fell behind early but couldn't complete the comeback against the hot-shooting Thunder. Oklahoma City turned to the long ball early and built a 28-5 lead on the strength of five 3-pointers, including three by Joe. Oklahoma City made 14 of 22 (63.6%) from beyond the arc before halftime, but by then Cleveland had cut the lead to 64-55 on a jumper by Mitchell to beat the buzzer. The Cavaliers got eight quick points from Merrill in the third quarter, and took a 69-68 lead — their first of the game — on a short jumper Jared Allen. Back-to-back 3-pointers by Jared McCain and Joe gave the Thunder an 82-75 advantage. But Cleveland scored 11 of the next 14 points, and got a 3-pointer by Jaylon Tyson to tie the score 86-all. Oklahoma City got consecutive 3s from Lu Dort, Kenrich Williams and Wallace to build a 102-95 lead in the fourth. Back-to-back jumpers by Isaiah Hartenstein, who had 10 points in the quarter, gave the Thunder a 106-98 lead they never relinquished. Up next Cavaliers: Host New York on Tuesday. Thunder: Visit Toronto on Tuesday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

videos.description: The Thunder down the Cavs at home, halting Cleveland's seven-game winning streak.
videos.headline: Thunder snap Cavs' 7-game winning streak

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Thunder snap Cavs' 7-game winning streak) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Isaiah Joe drills a trey for the Thunder to force a Cavaliers timeout.
videos.headline: Isaiah Joe's trey forces a Cavs timeout

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Isaiah Joe's trey forces a Cavs timeout) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Chet Holmgren lays in a bucket, then hustles back to make a big steal for the Thunder vs. the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Chet Holmgren makes the play on both ends of the court

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chet Holmgren makes the play on both ends of the court) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Isaiah Joe gets hot from behind the arc with back-to-back treys for the Thunder vs. the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Isaiah Joe hits back-to-back 3s for the Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Isaiah Joe hits back-to-back 3s for the Thunder) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Lu Dort powers in the and-1 bucket for the Thunder vs. the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Lu Dort gets the and-1 to fall for the Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Lu Dort gets the and-1 to fall for the Thunder) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell gets the floater off in time to beat the first-quarter buzzer for the Cavaliers vs. the Thunder.
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell's floater beats 1st-quarter buzzer for Cavs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell's floater beats 1st-quarter buzzer for Cavs) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell gets the buzzer-beater to fall for the Cavaliers vs. the Thunder.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell beats the halftime buzzer for Cavs) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Lu Dort drives to the rim for a Thunder and-1 vs. the Cavaliers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Lu Dort powers in another Thunder and-1) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.description: Cason Wallace comes up with the steal and throws the hammer down for the Thunder vs. the Cavaliers.
